---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to MiWhisper
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is currently weak, slow, confusing, or missing?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why This Is Worth The Complexity

Explain the payoff. What gets better, and for whom?

## Risks or Trade-Offs

Call out any obvious downsides, privacy implications, or UX complexity.

## Extra Context

Screenshots, mockups, examples, or comparable tools if useful.
